conduits
More information
Download Brochure
UV-stabilised conduits & accessories
Flexible and rigid conduits and accessories up to 10 years UV-stable
Download Flyer
ALUX – Pliable aluminium conduit for PV systems
Connect PV modules, design flexible transitions between modules or integrate into distribution boards on switchgear
Electrical Installation
The right conduits for every application: surface-mounted or in-wall, rigid or pliable, metal or synthetic materials, PVC or halogen-free and complying to LSF0H standards - Dietzel Univolt conduits meet every need. Our product program is completed by a comprehensive range of installation boxes and accessories.
Go to products
Civil Engineering
Our state-of-the-art ducting and civil engineering product range meets all requirements for installations in ground works, even when exposed to extreme mechanical or chemical stress.
Go to products
Cable Pulling Systems
Laying power and aerial cables as well as telephone lines in conduits poses a challenge every day. With Katimex cable pulling systems cables can be inserted quickly and simply. In conjunction with its own weight and the high tensions involved, extreme stresses can occur when the cable cannot be fed cleanly. For this area of application Katimex offers the suitable ground cable rollers and protection systems.
Go to products
Lightning Protection
Lightning protection concepts have to be as individual as the protected buildings. We provide top quality lightning protection components for a wide range of applications.
We focus on easy installation and protection against corrosion of the components for the lightning conductor systems.
Go to products
Electrical conduits for professionals
Dietzel Univolt is an independent family enterprise with a strong international orientation. As full-line distributor we provide our customers with a wide range of state-of-the-art electrical installation material.
We produce and market products for electrical installation, for structural and civil engineering and road construction in our plants in Vienna (Austria), Pezinok (Slovakia) and Dongguan (China).
Learn more about the company
Did you really get LSF0H?
Products
Not all manufacturers meet international standards and safety requirements when labelling their products LSF0H. Find out what makes the difference.
Read more
What does "UV stable" mean?
Information
UV stability is an important property of electrical conduits, but only few people know how to interpret the laboratory test results. We give an explanation.
Read more
Green responsibility
Quality and Environment

About necessary Cookies
Cookies are small text files that are stored on your terminal device and save certain settings and data to exchange with our websites via your browser. According to current jurisdiction we may set cookies without prior consent, when they are essential to run our website and to provide you with the services requested. For all other types of cookies, especially third-party cookies, we need your consent. Our website uses different types of cookies, placed either by us or by third parties.
Non-qualified cookies
These cookies are still undergoing classification.
